description: Manifest file of VantaCode taxonomies available.

taxonomies.name: vantacode-domain
taxonomies.description: Classification of code repositories by functional security domain.

taxonomies.name: vantacode-sector
taxonomies.description: Mapping of repositories to CISA critical infrastructure sectors and emerging sectors.

taxonomies.name: vantacode-threat
taxonomies.description: Mapping of repositories to MITRE ATT&CK tactics.

taxonomies.name: vantacode-mbt
taxonomies.description: Malicious Behaviors Taxonomy for AI and ML system threats.

taxonomies.name: vantacode-sensitivity
taxonomies.description: Data sensitivity and classification markings for repositories.

taxonomies.name: vantacode-governance
taxonomies.description: Governance baseline compliance scoring for repositories.
